hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.go) gofmt -w "$f";; esac; true

in=$(cat); echo "$in" | grep -Eq 'rm[[:space:]]+-rf|git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]].*--force|mkfs|dd[[:space:]]+if=' && { echo 'Guard: destructive command blocked. Ask me first.' >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0
